items.name: BBQ Smoked Brisket on a Kaiser
items.description: Impress your guests with our "AAA" Alberta beef brisket! It's smoked low and slow over apple and cherry woods, carved on-site, and served on a freshly baked Kaiser
items.simplified_description: Smoked Alberta beef brisket on a Kaiser with coleslaw, baked beans, and BBQ sauces

items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork on a Kaiser
items.description: Pulled Pork simmered in our house BBQ sauce and generously served on a freshly baked Kaiser. This meal is accompanied by our delicious oven-baked brown beans, freshly tossed creamy coleslaw, and assorted house-made BBQ sauces on the side
items.simplified_description: Pulled pork on a Kaiser with coleslaw, baked beans, and BBQ sauces on the side

items.name: Traditional Smokehouse Catering
items.description: Enjoy a traditional Smokehouse meal with your choice of one, two, or three types of smoked meat: Beef Brisket Pulled Pork * Chicken Breast This meal includes jalapeno cheddar cornbread muffins, oven-baked brown beans, freshly tossed coleslaw, and oven-roasted BBQ potatoes with butter, sour cream
items.simplified_description: Choice of smoked meats with sides including cornbread, beans, coleslaw, and BBQ potatoes
items.other_info: Buffet-style with serving staff; spicy horseradish on side

items.name: BBQ Beef on a Kaiser
items.description: An ALL BEEF favourite! Thinly sliced "AAA" Alberta Beef, slowly simmered in premium BULL'S-EYE BBQ SAUCE and generously served on a freshly baked Kaiser. This meal is served with our creamy coleslaw and delicious oven-baked brown beans
items.simplified_description: Sliced Alberta beef in BBQ sauce on a Kaiser with coleslaw and baked beans

items.name: BBQ Hamburger Meal
items.description: A 6oz. 100% Prime Rib burger on a freshly baked Kaiser. Lettuce, tomato, onion, real cheddar cheese, and condiments are served on the side so you can dress it up your way! This meal is served with creamy coleslaw and our special recipe classic potato salad
items.simplified_description: Prime rib burger on a Kaiser with sides of coleslaw and potato salad

items.name: BBQ Steak Meal
items.description: ”AAA” Alberta sirloin steak, lightly seasoned and grilled to perfection on-site. This meal is served with creamy coleslaw, our special recipe oven-baked brown beans, freshly baked dinner buns, and extra hot horseradish that will leave your mouth watering
items.simplified_description: Grilled Alberta sirloin steak with coleslaw, baked beans, salads, and dinner buns
items.other_info: Includes spicy horseradish and buffet service

items.name: Roast Beef Dinners
items.description: Enjoy either of our Roast Beef Dinners below for $32.95 per person Traditional Roast Beef Dinner All-you-can-eat "AAA” Alberta beef, carefully aged and slowly roasted to perfection
items.simplified_description: All-you-can-eat roast beef with sides including coleslaw, potatoes, carrots, and buns
items.other_info: Buffet-style with serving staff; spicy horseradish included

items.name: Prime Rib Dinner
items.description: "AAA" Alberta Prime Rib, carefully aged and slowly roasted to perfection, then carved on-site. Served with Caesar salad, baked potatoes with butter, sour cream, and fresh chives, honey-glazed carrots, freshly baked dinner buns, au jus, and extra hot horseradish
items.simplified_description: Roasted Alberta prime rib with salad, potatoes, carrots, buns, and horseradish
items.other_info: Includes serving staff and clean-up; spicy horseradish included

items.name: Oven-Roasted Turkey Dinner
items.description: Enjoy our classic oven-roasted turkey accompanied by cranberry relish and turkey gravy. This meal is served with garlic rosemary roasted potatoes, honey-glazed carrots, oven-baked stuffing, garden salad with a balsamic vinaigrette, and freshly baked dinner buns
items.simplified_description: Oven-roasted turkey with sides including potatoes, carrots, stuffing, salad, and buns

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Add another salad to any meal for $3.50 per person plus GST & service charge (18%). All ingredients for our salads are combined just moments before the serving time to ensure a fresh, crisp presentation. Offered as all you can eat
items.simplified_description: Freshly prepared Caesar salad served buffet-style

items.description: Add another salad to any meal for $3.50 per person plus GST & service charge (18%). All ingredients for our salads are combined just moments before the serving time to ensure a fresh, crisp presentation. Offered as all you can eat
items.simplified_description: Classic macaroni and cheese side dish
